name: vuln-scout
description: VulnScout plugins for AI-assisted whitebox security review, deterministic local quick scans, evidence-backed verification, portable reports, and one-release whitebox-pentest compatibility aliases.

plugins.name: vuln-scout
plugins.description: AI-assisted whitebox security review with a stable offline quick scan, evidence-backed verification, suppressions, and SARIF/HTML/bundle reports. Optional deep analyzers when installed. Five canonical workflows: full-audit, verify, report, scope, diff.

plugins.name: whitebox-pentest
plugins.description: Deprecated one-release compatibility aliases for VulnScout 3.2. Provides /whitebox-pentest:* shim commands that direct users to the canonical /vuln-scout:* commands.
